:mod:`innerpython` --- Python internals
=======================================

.. module:: core.innerpython
   :synopsis: InnerPython to handle Python introspection and internals
              to try and keep clean.

.. versionadded:: 0.1
.. moduleauthor:: Claude Gibert <claude.gibert@synopticview.co.uk>

The InnerPython class
---------------------

.. class:: InnerPython(object)

    The **InnerPython** class encapsulates Python introspection mechanisms
    and internal functions. That way it is easier to adapt to language
    changes.

    .. classmethod:: get_class(name)

    	:param name: the name of a type or a class
    	:type name: string

    	the get_class method attempts to find the class object for the
    	specified class named *name*. The name can be specified fully, e.g. 
    	Core.Date. get_class will attempt to load the module if it was not
    	imported. It also searched the builtin types.

    .. classmethod:: in_globals(name)

    	:param name: name of the variable
    	:type name: string

    	searches the global variable called name and return its values if found
    	or None otherwise.

    .. classmethod:: load_module(name)

    	:param name: name of a module, can be fully specified (e.g. mod1.mod2.mod)
    	:type name: string

    	attempts to load the module describes in name. The module can be fully 
    	specified::

    		from semperpy.core.innerpython import InnerPython as internal

    		date = internal.load_module('Core.Date')
    		d = date.Date(20090101)
    		print d
    		2009-01-01
